sentences.sentence: The benefits of vitamins to our well-being are now familiar to most; however, when the link between diets lacking in citrus fruits and the development of the affliction 'scurvy' in sailors was first discovered by James Lind in 1747, the concept of vitamins was yet to be discovered.
sentences.translation: 如今，大多数人都熟悉维生素对健康的益处；然而，1747年詹姆斯·林德首次发现缺乏柑橘类水果的饮食与水手患坏血病之间的联系时，维生素这一概念尚未被发现。

structure.text: The benefits of vitamins to our well-being
when the link between diets lacking in citrus fruits and the development of the affliction 'scurvy' in sailors was first discovered by James Lind in 1747

difficult_points: 分号连接现代认知与1747年的历史背景；however 表示强烈时间反差。
when 从句的主语中心是 the link，between... and... 连接饮食缺乏与坏血病发生。
was yet to be discovered 表示当时仍未发现，而非永远不会发现。

sentences.sentence: Scurvy, which causes softening of the gums, oral bleeding and, in extreme cases, tooth loss, is now known to present as a result of lack of Vitamin C in the diet.
sentences.translation: 坏血病会造成牙龈软化、口腔出血，严重时还会导致牙齿脱落；如今人们已知，它是饮食中缺乏维生素C所致。

structure.text: which causes softening of the gums, oral bleeding and, in extreme cases, tooth loss
as a result of lack of Vitamin C in the diet

difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，列举坏血病症状；in extreme cases 只重点限定 tooth loss。
is known to present 是被动报道结构；as a result of 引出病因。
present 在医学语境中指疾病表现或出现，而非“呈递”。

expressions.text: as a result of lack of

sentences.sentence: Additional symptoms include depression, liver spots on the skin – particularly arms and legs – loss of colour in the face and partial immobility; high incidence of the ailment aboard ships took an enormous toll on the crew's ability to complete essential tasks while at sea.
sentences.translation: 其他症状包括抑郁、皮肤上尤其是四肢的色斑、面色苍白和部分行动不便；船上这种疾病的高发严重削弱了船员在海上完成必要任务的能力。

structure.text: depression, liver spots on the skin – particularly arms and legs – loss of colour in the face and partial immobility
high incidence of the ailment aboard ships
the crew's ability to complete essential tasks while at sea

difficult_points: 分号后是新分句，说明症状之外对船上工作的整体影响。
破折号中的 particularly arms and legs 补充 liver spots 常出现的部位。
take a toll on 表示造成严重损害；to complete... 修饰 ability。

sentences.sentence: Suggestions that citrus fruit may lower the incidence or indeed prevent scurvy had been made as early as 1600.
sentences.translation: 早在1600年，就有人提出柑橘类水果可能降低坏血病发病率，甚至预防坏血病。

structure.text: that citrus fruit may lower the incidence or indeed prevent scurvy

difficult_points: that 从句同位说明 Suggestions 的具体内容。
had been made 是过去完成时被动，以林德1747年的工作为后续参照。
lower the incidence 与 prevent scurvy 并列，indeed 强调后者更强。

sentences.sentence: It was Lind, however, who would conduct the first clinical trial by studying the effect within scientific experimental parameters.
sentences.translation: 然而，真正按照科学实验参数研究这种效果、开展首次临床试验的人是林德。

structure.text: It was Lind, however, who would conduct the first clinical trial by studying the effect within scientific experimental parameters
who would conduct the first clinical trial
by studying the effect within scientific experimental parameters

difficult_points: It was... who... 是强调句，突出林德是首位开展临床试验的人。
would conduct 从历史叙述视角表示后来会实施；by studying... 说明实验方法。

sentences.sentence: However, while the correlation between consuming citrus fruit and avoidance of scurvy was established, the preventative properties were attributed to the presence of acids in the fruit and not what would later be identified as vitamin content.
sentences.translation: 然而，虽然食用柑橘类水果与避免坏血病之间的相关性得到确认，人们却把预防作用归因于水果中的酸，而不是后来被确定为维生素的成分。

structure.text: while the correlation between consuming citrus fruit and avoidance of scurvy was established
to the presence of acids in the fruit and not what would later be identified as vitamin content
what would later be identified as vitamin content

difficult_points: while 引导让步：相关性虽确定，作用机制却判断错误。
attribute A to B 的被动形式为 A were attributed to B。
what 从句是融合关系结构，与 the presence of acids 构成肯定与否定对比。

sentences.sentence: Lind's subjects for his trial consisted of twelve sailors already exhibiting symptoms of scurvy.
sentences.translation: 林德的试验对象由12名已经出现坏血病症状的水手组成。
difficult_points: consist of 表示整体由哪些成员构成。
exhibiting... 是现在分词短语，修饰 sailors，说明受试时已经患病。

sentences.sentence: These individuals were split into six groups; each pair common diet.
sentences.translation: 这些人被分成六组；每一对水手接受共同的基础饮食（源文此处疑有动词缺失）。
difficult_points: were split into 表示12人被分成六个二人组。
分号后的 `each pair common diet` 缺少谓语或介词，可能原意是每组采用共同基础饮食；解析与翻译保留并注明源文异常。

sentences.sentence: Pair 1 were rationed a daily quart of cider, pair 2 elixir of vitriol, pair 3 a given quantity of vinegar, pair 4 seawater, pair 5 oranges and a lemon and pair 6 barley water.
sentences.translation: 第一组每天定量获得一夸脱苹果酒，第二组服用硫酸酏剂，第三组服用一定量的醋，第四组饮用海水，第五组食用橙子和一个柠檬，第六组饮用大麦水。

structure.text: pair 2 elixir of vitriol, pair 3 a given quantity of vinegar, pair 4 seawater, pair 5 oranges and a lemon and pair 6 barley water

difficult_points: were rationed 是双宾语 ration sb sth 的被动形式，表示第一组获配给的物品。
后五组均省略 were rationed，只保留组别和对应试验补充物，需平行补全理解。

expressions.text: be rationed a daily quart of

sentences.sentence: Despite the trial having to be aborted after day five, when supplies of fruit were depleted, the findings of the interventional study showed that only the control group who were given fruit supplements showed any significant improvement in their condition (one had, in fact, recovered to the extent that he was fit enough to return to work).
sentences.translation: 尽管试验因水果供应耗尽而不得不在第五天后中止，干预研究的结果仍显示，只有获得水果补充的对照组病情出现显著改善（其中一人实际上已经康复到足以重返工作的程度）。

structure.text: Despite the trial having to be aborted after day five
when supplies of fruit were depleted
the findings of the interventional study
that only the control group who were given fruit supplements showed any significant improvement in their condition
one had, in fact, recovered to the extent that he was fit enough to return to work

difficult_points: Despite 后接 the trial having...，having 是动名词，trial 是其逻辑主语。
when 从句说明试验中止时发生的物资情况；depleted 是耗尽。
括号中 to the extent that... 表示康复达到的程度，fit enough to... 表示身体状况足以工作。

sentences.sentence: The immediate impact on sailors' health and incidence of scurvy on board ship was, however, limited as Lind and other physicians remained convinced that the curative effect was acid based.
sentences.translation: 不过，由于林德和其他医生仍深信疗效来自酸，试验对船员健康及船上坏血病发病率的即时影响十分有限。

structure.text: The immediate impact on sailors' health and incidence of scurvy on board ship
as Lind and other physicians remained convinced that the curative effect was acid based
that the curative effect was acid based

difficult_points: however 插入系表结构；主语中心词是 impact。
as 引导原因从句，解释为何试验发现未立即改变实践。
remain convinced that 表示仍坚信；acid based 是源文无连字符写法，意为以酸为基础。

sentences.sentence: Therefore, while consumption of citrus fruit was recommended, it was often replaced by cheaper acid supplements.
sentences.translation: 因此，虽然人们建议食用柑橘类水果，实际却常用更便宜的酸性补充剂代替。

structure.text: while consumption of citrus fruit was recommended

difficult_points: while 引导让步，对比推荐食用水果与实际替代做法。
it 指 consumption of citrus fruit 或 citrus fruit treatment；was replaced by 是被动语态。

sentences.sentence: The preventative Qualities of citrus fruit against scurvy were not truly recognised until 1800, though throughout the latter part of the 1700s, lemon juice was increasingly administered as a cure for sailors already afflicted.
sentences.translation: 直到1800年，柑橘类水果预防坏血病的作用才真正得到认可；不过在18世纪后半叶，柠檬汁已越来越多地被用来治疗患病水手。

structure.text: The preventative Qualities of citrus fruit against scurvy
though throughout the latter part of the 1700s, lemon juice was increasingly administered as a cure for sailors already afflicted

difficult_points: not... until... 表示直到1800年才真正认可；源文 Qualities 异常大写，已保留。
though 从句说明正式认识之前已有治疗实践；was administered 是被动语态。
already afflicted 修饰 sailors，省略了 with scurvy。

sentences.sentence: Nowadays, the implementation of findings discovered in clinical trials into mainstream medicine remains an arduous and lengthy process and the clinical trials themselves represent only a small stage of the process of developing a new drug from research stage to launch in the marketplace.
sentences.translation: 如今，把临床试验发现落实到主流医疗实践仍是一个艰难而漫长的过程，而且临床试验本身只是新药从研究阶段走向市场发布这一开发流程中的一个小环节。

structure.text: the implementation of findings discovered in clinical trials into mainstream medicine
and the clinical trials themselves represent only a small stage of the process of developing a new drug from research stage to launch in the marketplace

difficult_points: implementation of findings into medicine 表示把研究发现转化并纳入常规医疗。
and 后主语变为 clinical trials themselves，强调试验只是全流程一部分。
from research stage to launch 描述新药开发的起点和终点。

sentences.sentence: On average, for every thousand drugs conceived, only one of the thousand actually makes it to the stage of clinical trial, other projects being abandoned for a variety of reasons.
sentences.translation: 平均而言，每构想出一千种药物，只有一种真正进入临床试验阶段，其余项目会因各种原因被放弃。

structure.text: actually makes it to the stage of clinical trial
other projects being abandoned for a variety of reasons

difficult_points: conceived 修饰 drugs，指最初提出或设计的候选药物。
make it to 表示成功进入某阶段；only one 强调淘汰率极高。
句末是独立主格结构，other projects 与 being abandoned 构成被动关系。

expressions.text: make it to the stage of

sentences.sentence: Stages which need to be fulfilled prior to clinical trial – where the treatment is actually tested on human subjects -include discovery, purification, characterisation and laboratory testing.
sentences.translation: 临床试验之前必须完成的阶段——临床试验是真正在人体受试者身上测试治疗方法的环节——包括发现、纯化、表征和实验室测试。

structure.text: which need to be fulfilled prior to clinical trial
where the treatment is actually tested on human subjects
discovery, purification, characterisation and laboratory testing

difficult_points: which 修饰 Stages，need to be fulfilled 是被动不定式。
破折号内 where 修饰 clinical trial，说明该阶段做什么。
源文第二个破折号与 include 之间缺少空格（`-include`），已原样保留。

expressions.meaning_zh: 在人体受试者身上测试

sentences.sentence: A new pharmaceutical for treatment of a disease such as cancer typically takes a period of 6 years or more before reaching the stage of clinical trial.
sentences.translation: 一种用于治疗癌症等疾病的新药，通常需要六年或更长时间才能进入临床试验阶段。

structure.text: A new pharmaceutical for treatment of a disease such as cancer
a period of 6 years or more
before reaching the stage of clinical trial

difficult_points: pharmaceutical 在此作名词，指药物；such as cancer 举例说明疾病类型。
before reaching... 是省略主语的时间结构，逻辑主语是 new pharmaceutical。

expressions.text: take a period of 6 years or more
reach the stage of clinical trial

sentences.sentence: Since legislation requires subjects participating in such trials to be monitored for a considerable period of time so that side-effects and benefits can be assessed correctly, a further eight years typically passes between the stage of a drug entering clinical trial and being approved for general use.
sentences.translation: 由于法规要求对此类试验的受试者进行长期监测，以正确评估副作用和益处，一种药物从进入临床试验到获准普遍使用，通常还要再经过八年。

structure.text: Since legislation requires subjects participating in such trials to be monitored for a considerable period of time
so that side-effects and benefits can be assessed correctly
between the stage of a drug entering clinical trial and being approved for general use

difficult_points: Since 引导原因；require + 宾语 + to be monitored 是被动不定式复合宾语。
so that 引出长期监测的目的；side-effects and benefits 是被评估对象。
between 后并列 a drug entering... 与 being approved...，a drug 是两者的逻辑主语。

expressions.text: for a considerable period of time

sentences.sentence: One of the greatest barriers to clinical trial procedures is availability of subjects willing to participate.
sentences.translation: 临床试验程序面临的最大障碍之一，是能否找到愿意参与的受试者。

structure.text: One of the greatest barriers to clinical trial procedures

difficult_points: 主语中心是 One，系动词用 is；to clinical trial procedures 修饰 barriers。
willing to participate 后置修饰 subjects，说明所需受试者的条件。

expressions.text: one of the greatest barriers to

sentences.sentence: Criteria for selection is rigorous and trials where subjects are required to be suffering from the disease in question, experience tremendous recruitment difficulties as individuals already vulnerable due to the effects of their condition, are often reluctant to potentially put their health at higher levels of risk.
sentences.translation: 受试者筛选标准十分严格；而要求受试者正患有目标疾病的试验，会遇到巨大的招募困难，因为这些人已因病情而十分脆弱，往往不愿让健康面临更高风险。

structure.text: where subjects are required to be suffering from the disease in question
as individuals already vulnerable due to the effects of their condition, are often reluctant to potentially put their health at higher levels of risk

difficult_points: 源文 Criteria 为复数却搭配 is，属于主谓一致异常，已原样保留。
where 修饰 trials；are required to be suffering 是被动结构，强调试验招募患病者。
as 从句中 individuals 与 are 之间被长修饰语隔开，且逗号位置异常；put health at risk 表示使健康承担风险。

sentences.sentence: Clinical trials are conducted in line with a strict protocol and the stages of a trial are generally defined by five distinct phases.
sentences.translation: 临床试验按照严格方案开展，试验各阶段通常被划分为五个不同的期别。

structure.text: in line with a strict protocol
and the stages of a trial are generally defined by five distinct phases

difficult_points: in line with 表示遵循严格试验方案。
and 后主语变为 the stages；are defined by 表示阶段划分由五个期别构成。

sentences.sentence: A drug that is deemed safe and effective enough to reach the end of stage three is most often, at that point, approved for use in mainstream medicine.
sentences.translation: 被认为足够安全有效、能够完成第三期试验的药物，通常会在那时获准用于主流医疗。

structure.text: that is deemed safe and effective enough to reach the end of stage three
is most often, at that point, approved

difficult_points: that 修饰 A drug；deem + 宾语 + 形容词的被动形式为 is deemed safe and effective。
enough to... 表示安全有效程度足以完成第三期；at that point 插入说明批准时间。

sentences.sentence: Phase 0 involves a first-in-human trial (usually conducted using a small population often to fifteen subjects) with the purpose of ascertaining that the drug's effect is, in fact, the same as predicted in pre-clinical studies.
sentences.translation: 零期试验包括首次人体试验（通常仅使用大约十至十五名受试者的小样本），目的在于确认药物效果是否确实与临床前研究预测一致。

structure.text: usually conducted using a small population often to fifteen subjects
with the purpose of ascertaining that the drug's effect is, in fact, the same as predicted in pre-clinical studies
that the drug's effect is, in fact, the same as predicted in pre-clinical studies

difficult_points: conducted... 修饰 trial；源文 `often to fifteen` 疑为 OCR 错误，常理应是 ten to fifteen，翻译按十至十五理解但保留原文。
with the purpose of 后接动名词 ascertaining；that 从句作其宾语。
as predicted... 是省略结构，意为与临床前研究所预测的效果相同。

sentences.sentence: If no concerns are raised, the drug then enters Phase 1 of trial where a modest selection (usually between twenty and eighty subjects) of usually healthy volunteers, is exposed to the drug.
sentences.translation: 如果没有发现安全隐患，药物随后进入一期试验；在这一阶段，通常从健康志愿者中选取20至80人的适中样本接受该药物。

structure.text: where a modest selection (usually between twenty and eighty subjects) of usually healthy volunteers, is exposed to the drug

difficult_points: If 从句使用被动语态，表示未出现需要担忧的问题。
where 修饰 Phase 1，说明一期试验做法；a modest selection 是从志愿者中选出的样本。
源文在主语 volunteers 后多余逗号，is exposed to 表示受试者接触药物。

sentences.sentence: However, for HIV and cancer drugs, this stage is conducted using patients suffering from the condition in question.
sentences.translation: 不过，对艾滋病和癌症药物而言，这一阶段会使用患有目标疾病的患者开展试验。

structure.text: using patients suffering from the condition in question
suffering from the condition in question

difficult_points: However 对比通常使用健康志愿者的一期试验。
using... 说明试验采用何类受试者；suffering... 修饰 patients。
in question 表示当前药物所针对的疾病。

expressions.text: suffer from the condition in question

sentences.sentence: There are two main variations of Phase I testing, these being SAD (single ascending dose) and MAD (multiple ascending dose).
sentences.translation: 一期试验主要有两种形式，即SAD（单次递增剂量）和MAD（多次递增剂量）。

structure.text: two main variations of Phase I testing
these being SAD (single ascending dose) and MAD (multiple ascending dose)

difficult_points: There are 是存在句，说明一期试验的两种变体。
these being... 是独立主格结构，同位列出两种形式及缩写全称。

sentences.sentence: The former involves a single administration of a drug at a pre-determined level to one group of subjects, and the second involves administration of a pre-determined sequence of dosages.
sentences.translation: 前者是以预定剂量向一组受试者单次给药，后者则按预定剂量序列多次给药。

structure.text: a single administration of a drug at a pre-determined level to one group of subjects
and the second involves administration of a pre-determined sequence of dosages

difficult_points: The former 指 SAD；the second 按上下文指 MAD，常规对应表达通常是 the latter。
administration 在临床语境中指给药；at... level 与 to... group 分别说明剂量和对象。

expressions.text: a single administration of a drug

sentences.sentence: Phases 0 and 1 are geared towards establishing the safety of a pharmaceutical and once this has been confirmed, drugs pass into Phase II testing where, while safety continues to be monitored, the drug's effectiveness is also assessed using a larger group of subjects, ranging from twenty up to three hundred.
sentences.translation: 零期和一期试验旨在确定药物安全性；一旦安全性得到确认，药物便进入二期试验，此时在继续监测安全性的同时，还会使用20至300人的更大受试群体评估药物有效性。

structure.text: are geared towards establishing the safety of a pharmaceutical
and once this has been confirmed
drugs pass into Phase II testing
where, while safety continues to be monitored, the drug's effectiveness is also assessed using a larger group of subjects
ranging from twenty up to three hundred

difficult_points: be geared towards 后接动名词 establishing，表示阶段目标。
once 从句中 this 指 safety；has been confirmed 是现在完成时被动。
where 修饰 Phase II testing，内部 while 表示安全监测和有效性评估同步；ranging... 修饰 group。

sentences.sentence: In some trials, Phase II is regarded as involving two sub-stages, in that Phase 11(a) may be concerned with establishing optimum dosage levels and
sentences.translation: 在一些试验中，二期试验被视为包含两个子阶段，因为II(a)期可能主要用于确定最佳剂量水平，而……（下段续）。

structure.text: in that Phase 11(a) may be concerned with establishing optimum dosage levels and

difficult_points: regard A as doing 的被动形式说明二期试验被视为含两个子阶段。
in that 表示“因为、具体来说”，解释两个子阶段的分工。
源文将 Phase II 写作 `Phase 11`，且句子在 and 后跨段断开；已原样保留。

sentences.sentence: Phase 11(b) to evaluate effectiveness.
sentences.translation: （接上句）II(b)期则用于评估有效性。
difficult_points: 本片段延续上一段末尾的 and，完整语义是 Phase II(b) may be concerned with evaluating effectiveness。
源文继续把罗马数字 II 写成 11，并省略与前一分句相同的谓语。

sentences.sentence: Phase III is the most expensive, time-consuming and complex stage of the trial process, often involving as many as 3000 patients.
sentences.translation: 三期试验是整个试验流程中成本最高、耗时最长、最复杂的阶段，通常涉及多达3000名患者。

structure.text: the most expensive, time-consuming and complex stage of the trial process
often involving as many as 3000 patients

difficult_points: 三个形容词并列修饰 stage，其中 most 同时统领比较等级。
involving... 是现在分词补充说明三期试验规模；as many as 强调患者数量多。

sentences.sentence: At this stage, a new drug's effectiveness is rigorously tested and compared to that of the best of the existing alternatives already approved and in common use.
sentences.translation: 在这一阶段，新药的有效性会经过严格测试，并与已经获批且普遍使用的最佳现有替代疗法的有效性进行比较。

structure.text: to that of the best of the existing alternatives
already approved and in common use

difficult_points: is tested and compared 是两个并列被动动作。
that 代替 effectiveness，避免重复；the best of the existing alternatives 指现有替代疗法中最佳者。
already approved 与 in common use 并列修饰 alternatives。

sentences.sentence: Where research indicates that a pharmaceutical has passed all requirements of Phases 0, I, II and III, submissions to relevant regulatory and licensing bodies are then made.
sentences.translation: 如果研究表明某种药物已经满足零期、一期、二期和三期的全部要求，随后便会向相关监管和许可机构提交申请。

structure.text: Where research indicates that a pharmaceutical has passed all requirements of Phases 0, I, II and III
that a pharmaceutical has passed all requirements of Phases 0, I, II and III
submissions to relevant regulatory and licensing bodies

difficult_points: Where 在此相当于 if，表示满足条件的情况。
that 从句作 indicates 的宾语；has passed 表示药物已经通过全部要求。
submissions are made 是被动表达，to... 说明申请提交给哪些机构。

sentences.sentence: The final phase of clinical testing, Phase IV, is conducted over a lengthy period of time post-launch for general usage.
sentences.translation: 临床测试的最后阶段——四期试验——在药物上市供普遍使用后进行，并持续很长时间。

structure.text: The final phase of clinical testing
over a lengthy period of time

difficult_points: Phase IV 是 The final phase 的同位语。
post-launch 表示上市之后；for general usage 说明药物已进入普遍使用。

expressions.text: the final phase of clinical testing
over a lengthy period of time

sentences.sentence: This stage is, in essence, a safety net which involves continued monitoring of the drug, its properties and side-effects through which any long term adverse reactions, which remained undetected in the pre-launch clinical testing time frame can be discovered.
sentences.translation: 这一阶段本质上是一道安全网，需要持续监测药物、药物特性及副作用，从而发现任何在上市前临床测试时限内未被察觉的长期不良反应。

structure.text: which involves continued monitoring of the drug, its properties and side-effects
through which any long term adverse reactions, which remained undetected in the pre-launch clinical testing time frame can be discovered

difficult_points: in essence 插入说明本质；第一个 which 修饰 a safety net。
through which 指通过持续监测这一机制；其后 any long term adverse reactions 是从句主语。
第二个 which 修饰 adverse reactions；源文在 time frame 后缺少关闭逗号，can be discovered 才是外层从句谓语。

sentences.sentence: Identification of harmful effects at this stage, on occasion, has led to withdrawal of a drug from the market; for example, as was the case with cerivastin, a cholesterol-lowering drug, which was later found to have an adverse effect on muscle reaction which, on occasion, had fatal consequences.
sentences.translation: 在这一阶段发现有害作用，有时会导致药物撤市；例如降胆固醇药西立伐他汀，后来被发现会对肌肉反应产生不良影响，而这种影响有时会造成致命后果。

structure.text: Identification of harmful effects at this stage
withdrawal of a drug from the market
for example, as was the case with cerivastin
which was later found to have an adverse effect on muscle reaction
which, on occasion, had fatal consequences

difficult_points: Identification... 是主语；lead to 后接 withdrawal，表示发现风险可能导致撤市。
as was the case with... 引出实例；a cholesterol-lowering drug 是 cerivastin 的同位语。
第一个 which 指药物，第二个 which 最自然地指 adverse effect，说明有时会造成致命后果。

expressions.text: withdrawal of a drug from the market
